title: An open-source AI just beat OpenAI's GPT-5.5 at coding (1/6th the price)
abstract: An open-source AI just beat OpenAI's GPT-5.5 at coding (1/6th the price) stands out in the LLM landscape with strong reasoning, long context windows, and tool-calling support. Developer adoption speak...
abstract_zh: 伙计们，来个新鲜玩意儿——**6th the price**！这货简直就是效率的救星。比如写周报时，它能帮你迅速整理数据、生成图表；调Bug时，直接给你代码优化建议，省去一堆翻资料的时间。别人还在手动敲键盘时，你已经快人一步了。快来试试，保证让你爱不释手！
